CONTENT.Club career: Cozza joined Montpellier in 2010 and signed his first professional contract on 14 June 2017. He made his professional debut for Montpellier in a 0–0 Ligue 1 draw against Lyon on 19 November 2017.On 25 January 2023, Cozza signed a four-and-a-half-year contract with Bundesliga club VfL Wolfsburg.On 1 February 2024, Cozza was loaned out to French side Nantes until the end of the season.
CONTENT.Personal life: Cozza is the grandson of former Montpellier captain Jean-Louis Besson. He is of Italian descent from Calabria.
CONTENT.External links: Profile at the VfL Wolfsburg websiteFrance profile at FFFNicolas Cozza – French league stats at LFP – also available in French (archived)Nicolas Cozza at SoccerwayNicolas Cozza at L'Équipe Football (in French)Nicolas Cozza – UEFA competition record (archive)

SUMMARY: Nicolas Louis Marcel Cozza (born 8 January 1999) is a French professional footballer who plays as a centre-back or left-back for Bundesliga club VfL Wolfsburg.
